feed.title: Christian's Blog
feed.subtitle: Consuming API's and deploying infra since Stardate ~44895. Talk .md to me

entry.title: Configuring default Project creation in Openshift

link.title: Configuring default Project creation in Openshift

entry.summary: In this blog we will have a look at “Configuring project creation” in an Openshift cluster. We will: Create a Project Template Add resources like a limit-range to the template Disable project self-provisioning As always. We will be doing all the examples in a CRC (Code Ready Containers) environment. Project template When creating a new project in Openshift (a namespace) the API query...

entry.title: Controlling Ingress with Openshift Network Policy's

link.title: Controlling Ingress with Openshift Network Policy's

entry.summary: This blog will go in to the “software defined networking” of “Configure networking components” objective of the EX280 exam from RedHat. In this post we will: Traffic to pods The types of Network Policy’s we can create Create a Network Policy based on a application label This post focuses on Ingress (incoming traffic). You can also create Egress policy’s to manage outgoing traffic ...

entry.title: Exposing services with routes and SSL

link.title: Exposing services with routes and SSL

entry.summary: This blog will go in to “Configure networking components” objective of the EX280 exam from RedHat. In this post we will: Have a look at services Expose a service with a URL Check out the types of routes we can create Creating a route to a service that is encrypted with SSL As always. We will be doing all the examples in a CRC (Code Ready Containers) environment. Understanding servi...

entry.title: Manage users and policies, groups and permissions

link.title: Manage users and policies, groups and permissions

entry.summary: This blog will cover the “Manage users and policies” objective of the EX280 exam from RedHat. In this post we will: Configure the HTPasswd identity provider for authentication Create and delete users Modify user passwords Modify user and group permissions Create and manage groups Will also sprinkle in a little bit from “Manage users and policies” with: Define role-based access...

entry.title: Switch iTerm profile when running Vim

link.title: Switch iTerm profile when running Vim

entry.summary: I love using iTerm2 and Vim on my Mac. Today we are going to have a look at Profile Switching feature that iTerm2 has and how we can combine this with Vim. Recently I wrote about using vim-plug to easily install vim plugins. Using vim-plug I installed the theme “onehalfdark” (Theme link): # .vimrc "# Custom VIM File for CABenstein "## Loading the plugins using vim-plug call plug#begin() Plug ...
